name: Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the candied cherries, candied pineapple, pecans, sugar, self-rising flour, eggs, vanilla, lemon extract, and butter.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased and floured tube pan.
3. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F.
4. Reduce the temperature to 325°F and bake an additional 45 minutes.
5. The cake is done when it is golden brown on top and springs back when gently pressed.
